titleStmt.title: SII 40.260: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 260. (A.R. No. B. 305 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up before the Sakalēśvara temple.

Gives the genealogy of the king from Maṇḍa I, Burddhavarman, Maṇḍa II, who was the subordinate of Kubjavishnu. Records the construction of a temple Tripurantaka and excavation of a tank and also gift garden to the temple at Māmaṁḍala by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatu vijayajayā¨rddhakṛ korimṛgāṁkō
vīlasadanīcamūratrastavidva¨rṭkaraṁgaḥ
śiśirakiraṇa vaṁśāṁttaṁsako rājarājō raṇa vi
taraṇa kēlīlālasaḥ kubjaviṣṇuḥ . śrīmaccatu
¨rtthā bhījanāvataṁsaḥ kaṁ sadviṣaśśatrurivoragā
ṇāṁbabhūvatasyānu carānṛpasya śrī buddava
mmā nijanāthava¨rmmā . sa pālayāmāsa mahiṁ
mahīpatiḥ patiprasādāpanatāṁ natāhitaḥ
giri praticīṁ saharājalāṁccanai strisaptati grāma
vatīṁ sitāsinā . vaṁśaka¨rtṛṣugatēṣu kēṣucitta
tkulādajanī maṁḍabhūpatiḥ maṁḍanādajanību
ddhabhūpati¨rbbuddhanādajanī maṁḍabhūpatiḥ . Ê
śrīmāmaṁḍala Aviṭṭasya vaṁśādvaṁśāvataṁsakaḥ bē
tōjātasta tastasmātkumārō mārasannibhaḥ . tasmādvi
śvasṛ gutsavā¨rttha makhilavyāpārapāra pārāyaṇō
bāda śrīdayitolaladguṇakhaṇi¨rmmaṁ dakṣakō ma
ṁḍanaḥ pātaśśīta karadyuti ¨rdyutimatāṁ kaṁjēkṣaṇā
lakṣaṇassādasyādita śātravojani jagatprakhyā
takī¨rttipriyaḥ . tasyābhūdanugasya maṁḍanṛ
patestapāṁḍidagdhāgraṇi maṁḍaścaṁḍa balassamitsa
hacaraḥ krūrāsilekhāsakhaḥ kriḍākṛttavirō
diruṁḍa naṭanavyāpāra lōlēkṣaṇōṣummāṁśoḥ paru
ṣapratāpaivatadvahnē¨rnnabhasvāniva . sōyammaṁḍa
yanāyako nijapurē māmaṁḍalēśūlēnaśśākābdē
dharaṇīdharā¨rṇnavaviyattārādhinādha¨rmmatedavāgāra
makārayadhvajapaṭāstatkūṭa kōṭiskhalatyemā¨rttha
ddhisamula sattvacaivācāṁtismayassōcakeḥ . ha
ṁsasārasavirāviṇicaṁcacchaṁcarīkacayacāru
sarojosōbdividhīnicayācita śotesvēnakārita
viṭaṁkataṭākē . Āpādamuṣme tripurāṁtakāya vi
śālaśāleya bhuvaṁ bhavāyavikāsitādyānavanai
ścasā¨rddhamasausamucchaṁkhala śā¨ryyadu¨ryyaḥ .
vaṁggipuramuṁjaṭa boliya bhaṭlu Ādityabhaṭla
pōtiyabhaṭla mārakakuca kha 7
ceriprōlē kha 3 bīrakakētō kha 3
mūlastāna prōlakammakuṁṭa jēnā polamu pa
Digital edition of SII 40.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
